name: TP Data Lake - PokeAPI to MinIO Pipeline

parameters.query: SELECT pokemon_id, pokemon_name FROM pokemon LIMIT 10;

INSERT INTO pokemon_files (pokemon_id, bucket_name, object_key, file_name, file_type, file_size_bytes, mime_type, internal_url, created_at)
VALUES ({{ $('Prepare Files').item.json.pokemon_id }}, '{{ $('Prepare Files').item.json.bucket_name }}', '{{ $('Prepare Files').item.json.object_key }}', '{{ $('Prepare Files').item.json.file_name }}', '{{ $('Prepare Files').item.json.file_type }}', {{ $('Prepare Files').item.json.file_size }}, '{{ $('Prepare Files').item.json.mime_type }}', 'http://minio:9000/{{ $('Prepare Files').item.json.object_key }}', NOW());

INSERT INTO file_ingestion_log (file_name, bucket_name, object_key, processed_at, source, status)
VALUES ('{{ $('Prepare Files').first().json.file_name }}', '{{ $('Prepare Files').first().json.bucket_name }}', '{{ $('Prepare Files').first().json.object_key }}', NOW(), 'pokeapi', 'success');
